title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: AAW (wildcopy) due to %TypedArray%.prototype.set bounds check integer overflow
bounty_rationale: V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating controlled write outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
### VULNERABILITY DETAILS

#### Summary

V8 sandbox bypass, arbitrary address write (wildcopy) with controlled contents by bypassing bounds check with a double fetch + integer overflow in `%TypedArray%.prototype.set` -> `TypedElementsAccessor::CopyElementsHandleImpl()`.

This is an independent issue
